ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF PITCO FOODS. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT MISSION FOOD CENTER INC. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
